title: codereview-P2 pass 2/3: hash_32 definition should cross-ref exact C impl in lichen_link_rx.c:packet_hash fallback
description: P3 finding: The hash_32 pseudocode in 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:254 matches FNV but link layer uses crc32_ieee in samples/lora_ping and insecure MIC. Ensure the 'link layer hash' is exactly the one to use for CCP-15.8.3 slot and address computation. Update definition if needed for bit-exact match with test vectors. close_reason: Updated hash_32 definition in appendix-design-rationale.md with exact cross-ref to lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_rx.c:packet_hash fallback, FNV-1a32 test oracle, and distinction from crc32_ieee telemetry use; ensures bit-exact match with vectors. Verified with git diff and test_vectors.py remains passing.
